subcodes.first_line: We have sent forth a breath from the breezes of the Ridván in the form of a Tablet and dispatched it unto thee, that thine eyes may be gladdened thereby and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بعثنا نفحه من نفحات الرضوان علی هیئه اللوح و ارسلناه الیک لتقر به عینک و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
